name: Libella AAV-hTERT aging phase 1 registry study
summary: A single-arm phase 1 ClinicalTrials.gov registry study of intravenous AAV-hTERT for aging. ClinicalTrials.gov still listed unknown status and no posted results in the June 15, 2026 retirement sweep.

trial_details.watch_status_reason: Estimated completion was January 2021; a June 15, 2026 retirement sweep found no posted registry results, no PubMed result indexed by NCT/Libella/AAV-hTERT, and no sponsor-web result disclosure.
trial_details.expected_results_window: ClinicalTrials.gov lists estimated primary and study completion in January 2021; the June 15, 2026 retirement sweep found no posted results.
trial_details.horizon_note: Unknown registry status with no posted results, so this remains stale program context rather than evidence of benefit or safety.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Telomerase Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes safety, biomarkers, and function in Adults aged 45 years or older. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
